title: AURORA, 03506, Luxe Boutique, Skyler Sloth, 15In, Soft Toy, Peach
features: Part of Aurora's highly popular Luxe Boutique Premium Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Gorgeous super soft long pile material Sloth named Skyler
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Aurora World’s Luxe Boutique range is our premium brand with design-led features. The collection is immaculately handcrafted in the finest plush materials and is given the greatest attention to every detail. Each item is beautifully designed and is unique in their character. Introducing Skyler, our gorgeous peach and black Sloth. He is made using the softest touchable material and has an unique peach and back tipped plush material for his body. This is the perfect gift for birthdays, babies, Christmas and just because. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
